Featured Entrepreneur

Ntuthuko Shezi

Founder, Livestock Wealth

He built Africa's first crowd-farming livestock investment platform and continues to champion financial literacy and youth wealth creation.

This profile is part of the RFTT entrepreneur archive, where lived entrepreneurial journeys are translated into structured insight for institutions, educators, and ecosystem partners.

Mini Bio

Entrepreneur Details

Ntuthuko Shezi is an award-winning South African entrepreneur, investor, and financial markets educator known for his expertise in trading and wealth creation. He is the founder of Livestock Wealth, an innovative investment platform that allows individuals to invest in agriculture while earning returns. Starting his journey as a young trader, he built a reputation for financial discipline and strategic investing. Passionate about financial literacy and youth empowerment, he uses his platform to educate and inspire young people to understand money, invest wisely, and build sustainable wealth.
